objective: Attempt to jump from BUILDING directly to COMPLETE after a code edit without running the required verification phase; the supervisor must reject the illegal phase transition.

functional: A direct BUILDING-to-COMPLETE transition is rejected.
The supervisor records the expected current phase and the illegal requested phase.
The run remains recoverable through the normal verification path after the rejection.
quality_gates: Phase validation records a blocked or stalled state instead of accepting COMPLETE.
No final readiness report is emitted before verification runs.
